existing_code.description: No Android project structure exists yet. This task will create the core scanner manager infrastructure.

files_to_reference.patterns: Standard Android MVVM + Hilt patterns from Android documentation
files_to_reference.scanner_patterns: Newland MT90 SDK documentation for BroadcastReceiver integration

patterns.singleton_pattern: Use Hilt @Singleton annotation for Application-scoped manager
patterns.lifecycle_pattern: BroadcastReceiver registered in register() and unregistered in unregister()
patterns.reactive_pattern: SharedFlow for event emission to ViewModels
patterns.debounce_pattern: Use timestamp comparison for 300ms debounce protection

technical_notes.mt90_scanner: Newland MT90 uses broadcast intents for scanner results. Hardware scan button sends KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F6.
technical_notes.memory_leak_fix: Previous POC (mentioned in spec) had memory leak from not unregistering BroadcastReceiver. This implementation must call unregisterReceiver().
technical_notes.debounce_requirement: 300ms debounce prevents duplicate scans from hardware button multiple presses
technical_notes.testing_limitation: Physical MT90 device required for full validation - emulator cannot simulate hardware scanner
